title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a core of read, write, edit, and bash commands that can be extended with custom plugins. It supports multiple language models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering an alternative to rate-limited frontier models with customizable prompt templates and skills.
